Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">

</Aside>

## What It Does

Official Railway deploy/ops skill. Broad allowed-tools (railway CLI, curl, npm). Covers deploy, ops for Railway platform.

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add railwayapp/railway-skills --skill use-railway -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Official Railway deploy/ops skill with broad `allowed-tools` (`railway` CLI, `curl`, `npm`). Skills CLI reports High Snyk risk; confirm credential handling and signup/deploy flows before promoting to install-now.

Entry maintained via authoring + research for compose-external-wave-13; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add railwayapp/railway-skills --skill use-railway -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=inspect-then-install; selector=named. Requires railway CLI + creds.
